addSystem(JSystem) - Method in class jGameLib.ecs.GameState
Adds a JSystem specific to this state to be run in the game loop

Add a JSystem to be run on all GameStates executed by this state machine.

applyLayout() - Method in class jGameLib.ecs.ui2d.rendering.VerticalLayoutEntity
 
assertEntityHasComponent(Class<T>) - Method in class jGameLib.ecs.Component
Helper method to assert that the entity this component is attached to has an instance of the given component type, and returns the component.
assertUniqueInEntity(Class<? extends Component>) - Method in class jGameLib.ecs.Component
Helper method to assert that the entity this component is attached to does not already have an instance of the current component.
average(Vec2...) - Static method in class jGameLib.math.Vec2
Takes the average of the vectors
average(Vec2[], double[]) - Static method in class jGameLib.math.Vec2
Takes a weighted average of the vectors.
average(Vec2, Vec2, double) - Static method in class jGameLib.math.Vec2
Equivalent to Vec2.average(Vec2..., double...)({v1, v2}, {w1, 1 - w1}).
